title: Aureline graph impact-explorer row, view, reason class, and confidence-class contract
description: Boundary schema for the impact-explorer row family. Every impact-explorer surface (review-pack impact panel, AI evidence-impact panel, support-bundle impact packet, public query-family impact walk, topology-map impact overlay) renders one impact_explorer_view_record from this contract; each row inside is one impact_explorer_row_record. Both records reuse graph_node_record / graph_edge_record ids verbatim (schemas/graph/workspace_graph_seed.schema.json) — every row points at one 'impacts' edge or impacted graph node — and reuse the impact_reason_slot reason_class vocabulary plus the confidence_rollup_record / floor_reason / conflict_state vocabulary (schemas/graph/confidence_rollup.schema.json) instead of inventing impact-only certainty labels. Loaded scope, hidden-by-workset / hidden-by-policy / not-loaded counts, and imported-root markers are first-class so a partial or policy-limited workset is honest. Each row carries an export_hook and review_handoff list so the impact panel can hand the row off to a review pack, support bundle, or AI evidence packet without re-deriving the row identity. Raw absolute paths, raw provider URLs, raw email addresses, and raw credentials never cross this boundary; opaque ids and typed labels do. Adding a new reason_class, confidence_class, loaded_scope_state, hidden-count axis, export_format_class, or offered_action is additive-minor and bumps impact_reason_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

impact_reason_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the impact-explorer row family. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

monotonic_timestamp.description: Producer-local monotonic timestamp. Opaque equality-comparable string.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Never carries raw source bodies or raw URLs.

redaction_aware_text.description: Redaction-aware short text (≤ 480 graphemes). Surfaces render this verbatim. Never embeds raw source bodies, raw provider URLs, raw email addresses, or raw credentials.

reason_class.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/workspace_graph_seed.schema.json#impact_reason_slot.reason_class. Every impact row names exactly one reason class; impact explorers MUST NOT mint a private reason vocabulary.

rolled_up_confidence.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/confidence_rollup.schema.json#confidence_level. The row renders the rolled-up level verbatim and never silently upgrades.

floor_reason.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/confidence_rollup.schema.json#floor_reason. The row carries the floor_reason chip alongside rolled_up_confidence.

conflict_state.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/confidence_rollup.schema.json#conflict_state. Surfaces render the typed conflict chip alongside the rolled-up level.

anchor_drift_state.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/provenance_stamp.schema.json#source_anchor_drift_state. Surfaces render the typed drift chip instead of a generic 'not available' message.

loaded_scope_state.description: Frozen loaded-scope-state vocabulary mirroring schemas/graph/topology_map_view.schema.json#loaded_scope_state. The impact panel never claims fully_loaded when the active workset, policy projection, or imported-root contributor narrowed the result set.

active_scope_ref.description: Opaque ref to the active workset / scope artifact. The impact row never mints a parallel scope id.

scope_note.description: Optional redaction-aware note the surface renders verbatim alongside the scope chip.

loaded_scope_note.description: One loaded-scope note. Required on every impact row so a reviewer can see which scope the impact was computed under without re-querying the active workset.

hidden_by_workset_count.description: Count of impact targets excluded purely by the active workset's roots / patterns.

hidden_by_policy_count.description: Count of impact targets hidden by a policy projection in the active scope. The exact hidden ids never project.

not_loaded_count.description: Count of impact targets that exist by manifest but are not yet hydrated.

evidence_missing_count.description: Count of impact targets whose evidence (lineage, anchor, citation) cannot be reconstructed from the current graph state.

imported_root_count.description: Count of impact rows whose imported_root_status is non-not_imported. Drives the imported-root chip on the panel header.

inferred_transitive_count.description: Count of impact rows whose reason_class is inferred_transitive_impact. Surfaces render the inferred-transitive chip on the panel header so the user can see which fraction of the result is heuristic.

hidden_count_summary.description: Hidden / partial / imported-root / inferred-transitive accounting for the impact panel. Counts cross the boundary; the hidden member ids themselves never do.

review_handoff_class.description: Frozen review-handoff vocabulary. Mirrors schemas/graph/topology_map_view.schema.json review_handoff_entry so impact panels and topology maps share one handoff vocabulary instead of inventing per-surface synonyms.

export_format_class.description: Frozen export-format vocabulary for impact panels. Review-pack / support-bundle / AI-evidence packet exports preserve the full freshness/provenance/confidence/anchor-drift state and hidden-count summary; csv exports drop the chips and surfaces MUST disclose the loss.

preserves_hidden_counts.description: True when the export format preserves hidden_by_workset / hidden_by_policy / not_loaded / evidence_missing / imported_root / inferred_transitive counts verbatim. Lossy formats (csv_impact_table) MUST set this to false.

preserves_confidence_chip.description: True when the export carries rolled_up_confidence + floor_reason + conflict_state per row. csv_impact_table MAY collapse these to a single column and MUST set this false in that case.

preserves_anchor_drift_chip.description: True when the export preserves the per-row anchor_drift_state chip. Surfaces never claim an export carries the drift chip if the format does not actually project it.

preserves_imported_root_chip.description: True when the export preserves the per-row imported_root_status chip.

manifest_ref.description: Optional opaque manifest ref the export will be filed under (review pack id, support bundle id, AI evidence packet id).

supporting_artifact_ref_entry.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/provenance_stamp.schema.json#supporting_artifact_ref. Support bundles, review packs, and AI evidence packets walk this list to assemble a forensic packet.

view_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the parent impact_explorer_view_record. Required even on standalone row payloads so audit / support can reconstruct the parent panel.

impacted_node_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the graph_node_record.node_id this row says was impacted. Impact explorers never mint a private impacted-object identifier; they reuse the seed's node identity.

impacts_edge_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the graph_edge_record.edge_id of the 'impacts' edge that produced this row. Impact explorers reuse the seed's edge identity for the impacts relation rather than minting a private impact record.

impact_source_node_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the upstream node_id whose change caused the impact (the impacts edge's from_node_id).

reason_note.description: Re-export of schemas/graph/workspace_graph_seed.schema.json#impact_reason_slot.note. Surfaces render this verbatim alongside the reason chip.

confidence_rollup_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the confidence_rollup_record (schemas/graph/confidence_rollup.schema.json) that produced rolled_up_confidence / floor_reason / conflict_state.

anchor_drift_record_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to a source_anchor_drift_record when anchor_drift_state is not anchor_present_no_drift.

provenance_stamp_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the provenance_stamp_record for the impacts edge or the impacted node.

mutation_journal_ref.description: Optional mutation_journal entry / group id that produced this impact reason. Re-export of schemas/graph/workspace_graph_seed.schema.json#impact_reason_slot.mutation_journal_ref.

review_ref.description: Optional review-pack or approval ref attached to the impact.

supporting_artifact_refs.description: Zero or more supporting-artifact references the row points at. Support bundles, review packs, and AI evidence packets walk this list to assemble a forensic packet.

allOf.description: imported_root_status != not_imported MUST pair with imported_root_status_chip rendered (preserves_imported_root_chip true on at least one offered_export_hook). Imported entries cannot fold into a local row.
anchor_drift_state != anchor_present_no_drift MUST set anchor_drift_record_ref to a non-null opaque ref so the drift event remains auditable.

reason_class == inferred_transitive_impact MUST cap rolled_up_confidence at medium and MUST pair with floor_reason in {inferred_relation_caps_at_medium, ai_inference_caps_at_medium, low_contributor_pulls_to_low, unknown_contributor_pulls_to_low, missing_anchor_pulls_to_low, stale_relation_pulls_to_low, anchor_drift_pulls_to_low, partial_visibility_caps_at_medium, policy_hidden_caps_at_medium, missing_in_scope_pulls_to_low, imported_unverified_caps_at_medium}.

impact_explorer_row_record.description: One impact-explorer row. Reuses graph_node_record / graph_edge_record identity verbatim and reuses the impact_reason_slot reason_class plus the confidence_rollup_record floor_reason / conflict_state vocabulary instead of inventing impact-only labels. Required gates: imported entries must preserve the imported-root chip on at least one export hook; anchor drift must carry a non-null drift-record ref; inferred_transitive_impact must cap confidence at medium with a typed floor_reason.

workspace_graph_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the workspace_graph_record this impact view was derived from.

topology_view_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to a topology_map_view_record (schemas/graph/topology_map_view.schema.json). Topology and impact panels share node and edge identity through this ref.

active_scope_ref.description: Opaque ref to the active workset / scope artifact. The view never mints a parallel scope id.

row_count_total.description: Total visible rows in this panel. Distinct from hidden_count_summary, which carries the excluded counts. row_count_total MUST equal rows.length.

rows.description: Ordered visible rows. Empty array is admissible only when loaded_scope_state names why (partial_workset_loaded, policy_limited_loaded, imported_root_only_loaded, warming_loaded, stale_loaded, evidence_missing_loaded). An empty rows array under fully_loaded is non-conforming.

allOf.description: loaded_scope_state == fully_loaded MUST set every hidden_count_summary count field to 0 and every count_known field to true.
loaded_scope_state == policy_limited_loaded MUST set hidden_by_policy_known true.

impact_explorer_view_record.description: One impact-explorer view. Aggregates impact_explorer_row_records under one panel, names the active scope and the loaded-scope state, carries the same hidden-count summary the topology view carries, and offers review-handoff and export hooks. The view never claims completeness while disclosing hidden rows.
